goal: Validate that a generic task run against the real router plus open-source model remains bounded, reviewer-visible, and non-looping under live pressure.
strategy: Use two small repository-inspection tasks and measure whether live execution yields status artifacts, reviewer verdicts, and bounded reassignment when pressure appears.

jobs.title: Verify bounded execution anchors
jobs.instruction: Research and verify that the selected generic task docs define bounded execution, recovery, and reviewer guardrails.
jobs.success_check: The selected docs expose bounded execution anchors.

jobs.title: Synthesize generic task orchestration summary
jobs.instruction: Synthesize a concise generic-task summary from the selected files while keeping uncertainty explicit and without drifting into a domain-specific example.
jobs.success_check: The summary can stay grounded in the selected files and bounded task rules.
